_doc: Ground truth risky/safe labels for the 25 seed suppliers. Risky=true if the supplier appears in OFAC SDN, World Bank Debarred, or has clear factual basis (counterfeit findings, formal sanctions). Used solely for offline evaluation; the live system never reads this file.

dixon-tech.rationale: Listed PLI awardee, BIS-registered, multiple positive earnings articles.

foxconn-india.rationale: Tier-1 EMS with active Indian operations, BIS-registered.

pegatron-india.rationale: Authorised contract manufacturer with no flagged issues.

wistron-india.rationale: Authorised contract manufacturer with no flagged issues.

syrma-sgs.rationale: Listed Indian EMS firm with active orderbook.

kaynes-tech.rationale: Listed Indian EMS firm with positive guidance.

tata-electronics.rationale: Listed conglomerate division entering semiconductor manufacturing.

vedanta-foxconn.rationale: Joint venture formally dissolved (FT, 2025-07); ongoing financial distress for the JV entity.

sahasra-electronics.rationale: Operational SME; missing CRS in our sample data is a sample-data limitation, not a real-world flag.

bharat-fih.rationale: Foxconn Indian arm under different name; BIS-registered.

shenzhen-shadow-corp.rationale: On World Bank debarred list; counterfeit finding traced to this entity.

shell-electronics-bvi.rationale: On OFAC SDN (NS-PLC); on World Bank debarred list.
